permitGuides.title: Permit Guides
permitGuides.subtitle: Detailed information about common permits and procedures in Georgia

guides.title: Business Registration (LLC)
guides.what: Register a Limited Liability Company (LLC/შპს) in Georgia. One of the fastest business registration processes in the world — often completed same-day.
guides.who: Georgian citizens, foreign nationals, and legal entities looking to establish a business presence in Georgia.
guides.docs: Founder's passport/ID, company charter (Articles of Association), registered office address, bank account confirmation.
guides.timeline: 1–2 business days for standard registration. Expedited same-day service available.

guides.title: Construction Permit (Class II–IV)
guides.what: Obtain permission for new construction, renovation, or demolition projects. Required for most buildings except small residential structures.
guides.who: Property owners, developers, construction companies, or authorized representatives undertaking building projects.
guides.docs: Land ownership documents, architectural project, structural engineering report, environmental impact assessment (for Class III–IV), neighbor consent (if applicable).
guides.timeline: Class II: 12 business days. Class III: 18 business days. Class IV: 25 business days.

guides.title: Residence Permit
guides.what: Obtain legal right to reside in Georgia for an extended period. Multiple categories available: work, study, family reunification, investment.
guides.who: Foreign nationals planning to stay in Georgia beyond the visa-free period (typically 1 year for most nationalities).
guides.docs: Valid passport, application form, passport photos, proof of legal basis (employment contract, enrollment letter, investment proof), health insurance, proof of accommodation.
guides.timeline: 30 calendar days from submission. Expedited processing: 10 business days (additional fee).

guides.title: Activity License (Regulated Industries)
guides.what: Obtain authorization to operate in regulated sectors: pharmaceuticals, financial services, telecommunications, mining, and others.
guides.who: Companies and individuals planning to operate in industries requiring special government authorization.
guides.docs: Business registration documents, compliance documentation specific to the sector, professional qualifications, facility inspection reports.
guides.timeline: Varies by sector: 10–30 business days. Some licenses require additional inspections.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about permits and our services

items.question: How much do your services cost?
items.answer: Our pricing varies depending on the type and complexity of the permit. We offer a free initial consultation where we assess your needs and provide a transparent quote with no hidden fees.

items.question: Do I need to be physically present in Georgia?
items.answer: For most business registrations and some permit applications, you can authorize a representative to act on your behalf through a power of attorney. We can guide you on which procedures require your presence.

items.question: How long does business registration typically take?
items.answer: Standard LLC registration in Georgia takes 1–2 business days. With expedited service, it can be completed the same day. This includes registration with the National Agency of Public Registry (NAPR).

items.question: Can you help with permits in regions outside Tbilisi?
items.answer: Yes, we assist clients throughout Georgia, including Batumi, Kutaisi, and other regions. Our team is familiar with local municipal requirements across the country.

items.question: What languages do you provide services in?
items.answer: Our team is fluent in Georgian, English, and Russian. All documents can be prepared in Georgian (required for official submissions) with English translations provided for your records.

items.question: What happens if my permit application is denied?
items.answer: Denials are rare with proper preparation, but if it happens, we analyze the reasons, prepare any additional documentation needed, and resubmit the application. Our 98% success rate reflects our thorough approach to initial submissions.

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Comprehensive permit and licensing solutions tailored to your needs in Georgia

categories.title: Business Licensing
categories.description: From company formation to regulatory compliance, we handle every aspect of business licensing in Georgia.
categories.longDescription: Georgia is consistently ranked among the easiest countries in the world to start a business. Our team ensures you take full advantage of the streamlined processes while staying compliant with all regulations.

categories.title: Construction Permits
categories.description: Navigate the full construction permitting process from initial application to final inspection approval.
categories.longDescription: Whether you're building a residential property or a large commercial development, our experts guide you through Georgia's construction permit classes (I-IV) and ensure all technical documentation meets municipal requirements.

categories.title: Immigration & Residency
categories.description: Complete immigration support for expats, investors, and digital nomads looking to live and work in Georgia.
categories.longDescription: Georgia offers generous visa-free policies and attractive residency options for foreign nationals. We simplify the entire process, from initial visa consultation to long-term residence permits and citizenship pathways.

categories.title: Government Services
categories.description: Professional representation and document handling with all Georgian government agencies and registries.
categories.longDescription: Dealing with government agencies can be time-consuming and complex, especially for foreign nationals. Our team acts as your authorized representative, handling all interactions with public institutions on your behalf.

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for permits and licensing in Georgia
